title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Wabash National India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Wabash National India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wabash National India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!
